description: A deployment failure occurred because the Development schema (HR_DEV) has drifted from Production (HR_PROD). You must build a drift detection tool. Connect to the database (localhost:1521/XEPDB1) as SYSTEM/OraclePassword123. Create a reporting table named SYSTEM.SCHEMA_DRIFT_LOG with columns OBJECT_NAME, DRIFT_TYPE, DEV_VALUE, and PROD_VALUE. Compare the HR_PROD and HR_DEV schemas to detect missing tables, missing or extra columns, data type mismatches (including precision/scale), and nullability mismatches. Populate the reporting table with these findings and export the log to /home/ga/Desktop/drift_report.txt.
